commands.review_summary:
Adds a terminal-session lifecycle helper, uses it to rotate CLI and reply sessions away from terminal rows, clears terminal lifecycle markers on new reply rows, and prevents restart-sentinel continuations from dispatching into terminal entries.

PR surface: Source +34, Tests +132. Total +166 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main lets timestamp-fresh terminal rows pass normal freshness checks and queues restart continuations without a terminal guard. I did not establish a live Telegram restart reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed for the restart-continuation policy and the remaining live gateway/Telegram proof gap; there is no narrow automated code repair to queue.

target.title: fix(sessions): avoid terminal session reuse
